ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nfts" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the NFT */,
  "archetype" TEXT /* Archetype of the NFT (e.g., ROCKBROS, MECHANIZED) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the NFT (e.g., RADBRO, OAKBROS) */,
  "holder_address" TEXT /* Wallet address of the current holder of the NFT */,
  "holder_owned" INTEGER /* Number of NFTs owned by the current holder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the NFT was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the NFT metadata was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the NFT */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the NFT */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the NFT */,
  "creator_address" TEXT /* Wallet address of the creator of the NFT */,
  "minted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the NFT was minted */,
  "royalty_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of royalty to be paid to the creator on secondary sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nfts_holder_address FOREIGN KEY ("holder_address") REFERENCES holders ("holder_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holder */,
  "holder_address" TEXT /* Wallet address of the holder */,
  "total_nfts_owned" INTEGER /* Total number of NFTs owned by the holder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the holder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the holder record was last updated */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the holder's wallet address is verified */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the holder, if provided */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the holder's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nft_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer event */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT being transferred */,
  "from_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous holder */,
  "to_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current holder */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash for the transfer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transfer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transfer record was last updated */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the NFT at the time of transfer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction was made */,
  "marketplace" TEXT /* Name of the marketplace where the transfer took place */,
  "royalty_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether royalty was paid for this transfer */,
  "royalty_amount" TEXT /* Amount of royalty paid, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nft_transfers_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES nfts ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nft_transfers_to_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_holder_id") REFERENCES holders ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nft_transfers_from_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_holder_id") REFERENCES holders ("holder_id")
)
